Maybe it's something more systemic.
I'm thinking about conditions like esophagitis, which can cause pain when swallowing.

Candidiasis is a fungal infection that can occur in the mouth and esophagus, especially in immunocompromised individuals.

Also, the absence of visible lesions in the mouth and pharynx doesn't rule out an underlying issue in the esophagus.
